steps.title: Find the time signal
steps.content: The phrase “to this day” signals that the sentence describes something in the present, not past or hypothetical.

steps.title: Apply verb tense to the time signal
steps.content: Present-time adverbials require present-tense verbs. “Are used to this day” correctly expresses that these ancient emulsifiers remain in use now. The other choices use past or conditional tenses, which fail to match the present-time signal. That matches choice D — D is correct.
